summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Caca Radar monetization and gamification system (8th iteration). Backend APIs working well with 41/43 tests passing. Frontend displays correctly with premium features visible. Main monetization features (subscriptions, badges, leaderboards) functioning as expected.

minor_bugs.impact: Admin dashboard may not show subscription count

false_positives.issue: Test expected 403 but got 422 - actually correct behavior (validates file before checking premium status)
Test expected 403 but got 200 - user already has active subscription

ui_bugs.issue: Profile page redirects to login even after successful authentication

integration_issues.issue: User session not persisting when navigating to profile page

passed_tests: Reports include freshness labels (Fresca/En proceso/Fósil) and confidence scores
Filter reports by freshness and confirmed status working
Photo upload blocked for non-premium users (403 restriction working)
Badges endpoint returns 10 badges with earned status
Weekly leaderboard accessible for premium users
Admin metrics endpoint returns user and report counts
Map page loads with filter and heatmap toggles for premium users
Premium features (filter/heatmap toggles) visible for subscribed users
User menu shows Profile, Leaderboard, Dashboard options
Report creation flow working with premium photo upload

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (main features working, profile page auth issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix profile page authentication persistence issue - user gets redirected to login even after successful authentication. Also consider adding 'active_subscriptions' field to admin metrics endpoint and standardizing field names (cleanliness_score vs score).
